# Colophon {-}

```{r colophon-info, echo = FALSE, eval = TRUE}
cat("Built with:\n")
cat("  bookdown:   ", as.character(packageVersion("bookdown")), "\n")
cat("  rmarkdown:  ", as.character(packageVersion("rmarkdown")), "\n")
cat("  knitr:      ", as.character(packageVersion("knitr")), "\n")
cat("  R:          ", R.version.string, "\n")
cat("  Build date: ", as.character(Sys.Date()), "\n")
commit <- tryCatch(
  system("git rev-parse --short HEAD", intern = TRUE, ignore.stderr = TRUE),
  error = function(e) "unknown"
)
cat("  Commit:     ", commit, "\n")
```

LLM assistance (self-hosted Mistral Le Chat via Ollama/`ollamar`, plus
GitHub Copilot in RStudio) was used for copyediting, formatting, and
scaffolding tasks only — see Acknowledgments.

```{r colophon-session, echo = FALSE, eval = TRUE, results = "asis"}
if (requireNamespace("sessioninfo", quietly = TRUE)) {
  cat("\n```\n")
  print(sessioninfo::session_info(pkgs = "attached"))
  cat("\n```\n")
}
```
